data.title: RED test: Gate 2c integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
data.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2c.py with structural validation tests.

Tests:
1. test_gate_2c_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 2c section
2. test_gate_2c_dispatches_script — references gate-2c-test-regression-check.py
3. test_gate_2c_intent_suppression — documents Gate 1a suppression via --intent-aligned
4. test_gate_2c_post_investigation — Gate 2c appears after fix proposal
5. test_gate_2c_primary_signal — references signal_type primary
6. test_gate_2c_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation
7. test_gate_2c_specific_specific_exemption — documents specific->specific replacement exemption

Docstring: structural metadata validation -- design contract verification.
Append to existing .test-index entry for fix-bug/SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2c.py
- [ ] At least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2c.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] .test-index updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_2c'
